summary: Tested 'The Lineup' - Surf Session Lobby System. All backend endpoints working (GET /lineups, POST /lineup/open, /join, /leave, /lock, /close). Frontend LineupTab component renders correctly with 'Start a Lineup' CTA, 'New Lineup' button, and 'No Active Lineups' empty state. Fixed bug: session_time field didn't exist in Booking model.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: bookings.py line 3381 - session_time field doesn't exist in Booking model. Changed to extract time from session_date using strftime('%I:%M %p')
seed_data_creation: None - tested with empty lineups (correct behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Lineup feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints: GET /api/bookings/lineups returns array (empty if no lineups), POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/open opens lineup with visibility settings, POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/join adds participant, POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/leave removes participant, POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/lock locks lineup and triggers payment notifications, POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/close closes lineup. Frontend: LineupTab is the first/default tab in Bookings page, shows 'Start a Lineup' CTA with 'New Lineup' button, empty state shows 'No Active Lineups'. Clicking 'New Lineup' opens PhotographerDirectory modal.

lineup_tab_renders.notes: LineupTab is first/default tab in Bookings page

start_lineup_cta.notes: 'Start a Lineup' CTA with 'New Lineup' button displayed at top

empty_state.notes: 'No Active Lineups' empty state shown when user has no lineups

get_lineups_endpoint.notes: GET /api/bookings/lineups returns empty array when no lineups

bugs_fixed.issue: session_time field doesn't exist in Booking model
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'lineup.session_time' to 'lineup.session_date.strftime('%I:%M %p') if lineup.session_date else None'
